Bash(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT DATE\(timestamp\) as day, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM zone_readings GROUP BY day ORDER BY day;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "$DB" "SELECT id, timestamp, zone_name, temperature, humidity, power, outdoor_temp, outdoor_dew_point FROM zone_readings WHERE DATE\(timestamp\) = ''2026-03-07'' ORDER BY timestamp LIMIT 30;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "$DB" "SELECT zone_name, COUNT\(*\) as cnt, MIN\(timestamp\) as first_ts, MAX\(timestamp\) as last_ts FROM zone_readings WHERE DATE\(timestamp\) = ''2026-03-07'' GROUP BY zone_name;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "$DB" "WITH ordered AS \( SELECT *, LAG\(power\) OVER \(PARTITION BY zone_name ORDER BY timestamp\) AS prev_power FROM zone_readings WHERE DATE\(timestamp\) = ''2026-03-07'' \) SELECT zone_name, COUNT\(*\) as power_changes FROM ordered WHERE power != prev_power GROUP BY zone_name ORDER BY power_changes DESC;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "/Users/mauritsbeerepoot/Library/Application Support/Airzone/airzone_history.db" "WITH ordered AS \( SELECT *, LAG\(power\) OVER \(PARTITION BY zone_name ORDER BY timestamp\) AS prev_power FROM zone_readings WHERE DATE\(timestamp\) = ''2026-03-07'' \) SELECT zone_name, COUNT\(*\) as power_changes FROM ordered WHERE power <> prev_power GROUP BY zone_name ORDER BY power_changes DESC;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "/Users/mauritsbeerepoot/Library/Application Support/Airzone/airzone_history.db" "WITH ordered AS \( SELECT *, LAG\(power\) OVER \(PARTITION BY zone_name ORDER BY timestamp\) AS prev_power FROM zone_readings WHERE DATE\(timestamp\) = ''2026-03-07'' \) SELECT timestamp, zone_name, temperature, humidity, prev_power as prev, power as curr, outdoor_temp FROM ordered WHERE power <> prev_power ORDER BY timestamp;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "/Users/mauritsbeerepoot/Library/Application Support/Airzone/airzone_history.db" "SELECT id, timestamp, zone_name, humidity, room_temp, outdoor_temp, on_thresh, effective_on_thresh, off_thresh, effective_off, is_warm_now, action, reason FROM control_decisions WHERE DATE\(timestamp\) = ''2026-03-07'' ORDER BY timestamp LIMIT 60;")
Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "/Users/mauritsbeerepoot/Library/Application Support/Airzone/airzone_history.db" "SELECT * FROM heating_cycles ORDER BY start_ts DESC LIMIT 20;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "/Users/mauritsbeerepoot/Library/Application Support/Airzone/airzone_history.db" "SELECT id, timestamp, zone_name, humidity, room_temp, outdoor_temp, effective_on_thresh, effective_off, is_warm_now, action, reason FROM control_decisions WHERE DATE\(timestamp\) = ''2026-03-07'' AND action <> ''NO_ACTION'' ORDER BY timestamp;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "/Users/mauritsbeerepoot/Library/Application Support/Airzone/airzone_history.db" "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_decisions, SUM\(CASE WHEN action = ''NO_ACTION'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as no_action, SUM\(CASE WHEN action = ''DEFERRED'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as deferred, SUM\(CASE WHEN action = ''TURN_ON'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as turn_on, SUM\(CASE WHEN action = ''TURN_OFF'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as turn_off FROM control_decisions WHERE DATE\(timestamp\) = ''2026-03-07'';")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "/Users/mauritsbeerepoot/Library/Application Support/Airzone/airzone_history.db" "SELECT timestamp, zone_name, temperature, humidity, power, outdoor_temp FROM zone_readings WHERE DATE\(timestamp\) = ''2026-03-07'' AND zone_name IN \(''Contis/Cuisine'', ''Contis/Ontario''\) AND timestamp BETWEEN ''2026-03-07T05:00:00Z'' AND ''2026-03-07T07:00:00Z'' ORDER BY timestamp, zone_name;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "/Users/mauritsbeerepoot/Library/Application Support/Airzone/airzone_history.db" "SELECT timestamp, zone_name, temperature, humidity, power, outdoor_temp FROM zone_readings WHERE DATE\(timestamp\) = ''2026-03-07'' AND timestamp BETWEEN ''2026-03-07T17:25:00Z'' AND ''2026-03-07T17:40:00Z'' ORDER BY timestamp, zone_name;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "/Users/mauritsbeerepoot/Library/Application Support/Airzone/airzone_history.db" "SELECT zone_name, MIN\(humidity\) as min_hum, AVG\(humidity\) as avg_hum, MAX\(humidity\) as max_hum, MIN\(temperature\) as min_temp, MAX\(temperature\) as max_temp, SUM\(power\) as readings_with_power_on, COUNT\(*\) as total_readings FROM zone_readings WHERE DATE\(timestamp\) = ''2026-03-07'' GROUP BY zone_name ORDER BY avg_hum DESC;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "/Users/mauritsbeerepoot/Library/Application Support/Airzone/airzone_history.db" "SELECT zone_name, COUNT\(*\) as cycles, SUM\(duration_hours\) as total_hours, AVG\(duration_hours\) as avg_dur, AVG\(humidity_drop\) as avg_hum_drop, AVG\(drying_rate\) as avg_dry_rate FROM heating_cycles WHERE DATE\(start_ts\) = ''2026-03-07'' GROUP BY zone_name ORDER BY cycles DESC;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column "/Users/mauritsbeerepoot/Library/Application Support/Airzone/airzone_history.db" "SELECT zone_name, start_ts, end_ts, printf\(''%.1f'', duration_hours\) as hrs, humidity_start, humidity_end, humidity_drop, printf\(''%.1f'', drying_rate\) as dry_rate, printf\(''%.1f'', avg_outdoor_temp\) as out_temp, reached_threshold, printf\(''%.2f'', COALESCE\(rebound_rate,0\)\) as rebound FROM heating_cycles ORDER BY start_ts LIMIT 39;")
